falsification_conditions.condition: The price rises above the 200-day moving average by 12% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above a major trendline would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by indicating a confirmed bullish trend, contradicting the pattern's similarity to a prior bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 20-day average during a sustained price surge
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would signal a blowoff top, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and indicating a rapid reversal rather than consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks below the 2024 August bottom support level by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A decisive breakdown below a key historical support level would invalidate the pattern match and prove the 'HOLD' signal incorrect by confirming a bearish continuation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
